completed_modules: Beta reader personas and aggregate panel
known_issues: Electron-backed folder create/open/save still needs a dedicated desktop-only end-to-end pass beyond browser-mode Playwright.
Graph marquee selection and higher-order board editing are not complete yet.
Timeline fork/merge semantics exist in data and baseline UI, but dedicated fork/merge editing controls are still lighter than the final product target.
Agent Dock contracts are ready for future CLI/LangGraph integration, but real task execution is not wired in.
backlog: Add Electron E2E coverage for the real project-folder lifecycle
Deepen graph editing with marquee selection, richer edge editing, and board management polish
Expand timeline fork/merge authoring controls and shared-event visualization
Wire real local task execution behind Agent Dock and Workbench
Add undo/history and richer release-grade export controls
